plainEnglish: At Level AAA, tap and click targets should be at least 44×44 CSS pixels, with some exceptions for inline links and equivalent controls. Larger targets are much easier to hit for people with motor difficulties or anyone using touch.
whyItMatters: Users with motor disabilities or tremors, and touchscreen users, frequently miss targets smaller than 44×44 pixels.
quickCheck: Measure interactive targets in DevTools and confirm each is at least 44×44 CSS pixels, or qualifies for an exception.
commonMistakes: Icon buttons or close (×) buttons smaller than 44×44px.
Tightly packed small tap targets with no padding to enlarge the hit area.
Relying on a tiny visual icon without expanding its clickable region.
